display_text: Disruptor Aghanim's Scepter: Static Storm now mutes items. This is a powerful anti-item counter, crippling enemies reliant on active item effects like BKB, Eul's Scepter, or Glimmer Cape, ensuring they remain vulnerable during team fights.
search_text: Disruptor Aghanim Scepter anti-item counter item disable BKB Eul's Glimmer Cape team fight mute

display_text: Disruptor Aghanim's Shard: Thunder Strike gains increased cast range, strike count, and ground-targeted functionality. This enhances Disruptor's role as a zoning and initiation hero, allowing him to set up ambushes in key chokepoints or deny enemy movement safely.
search_text: Disruptor Aghanim Shard Thunder Strike zoning initiation ambush ground-targeted chokepoint
